input.instructions: Solve the Polyomino Mining optimization problem. You need to determine the optimal sequence of drilling queries and noisy aggregate queries to identify the locations of the polyominoes with minimum cost. Consider the information gain per unit cost for each query type. Provide the final answer in the required format: FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer> and JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>.

orchestration.decision_notes: The previous child node indicated it would implement a Python script to solve the mathematical model. I will now execute that logic to compute the optimal sequence and provide the final answer.

results.content: I am executing the mathematical modeling and optimization script to determine the minimum cost sequence for the Polyomino Mining problem.
